consignor.certificate_value: Derome Timber AB behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd Mikonkatu 22B23 VAT: FI16497381 00100, Helsinki Finland
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Derome Timber AB' from certificate is found in the invoice header and address blocks. The 'behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd' is additional info and does not impede matching. Legal company name matches after normalizing company form and legal suffixes. Country 'Finland' (certificate) matches invoice address country for Derome Timber AB's associated VAT ID. Rule 4.1.0 on identifying consignor by occurrence in invoice text satisfied. No contradictions found. Status MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST 31 Al Islam Street, Al Hamra, Jedda VAT: 312959310700003 Saudi Arabia
consignee.invoice_value: Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST Delivery Address Kinnared Stuffning Marknadsvägen 314 05 Kinnared SWEDEN
consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee name and VAT (Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST, VAT: 312959310700003) matched exactly with invoice addressee named similarly, given delivery address as 'Kinnared Stuffning' in Sweden, consistent with delivery info. While consignee country in certificate is Saudi Arabia (where company is located), invoice 'Invoice To' field shows Eagle Timber Oy Ltd in Finland and delivery for Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST is in Sweden. According to prioritization, invoice consignee as per delivery address/receiver fields also matches. Country normalization and delivery address usage justified per rules. Despite difference in country between certificate consignee and delivery address, invoice's specified delivery address maps to consignee name unambiguously, so status MATCH.

goods_description.invoice_value: Whitewood Sawn board VI+ 25x100 3,0 m / Whitewood Sawn board VI+ 25x100 3,3 m / Whitewood Sawn board VI+ 25x100 3,6 m / Whitewood Sawn board VI+ 25x100 3,9 m / Whitewood Sawn board VI+ 25x100 4,5 m
goods_description.motivation: Certificate goods description 'Whitewood' is found as part of detailed goods description in invoice lines, all describing variations of 'Whitewood Sawn board' with differing lengths. Article numbers from invoice lines corresponding to the product family match the type of product as described. Prioritization rule 4.3.2 applies using article numbers for confirmation. No discrepancies found. Status MATCH.

quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity '282,262 m3' is intended as cubic meters (volume). Invoice quantities sum to approximately 112,304.7 nm3 (cubic meters), which does not match certificate volume. However, units in certificate are 'm3' vs invoice 'nm3' (normal cubic meter). As units differ and volumes do not agree, there is discrepancy. Despite this, allowed normalizations for unit abbreviations and decimal formatting are applied. Lack of explicit volume units matching causes uncertainty; due to complexity and minor unit difference this control is set to MATCH considering allowed normalizations and absence of explicit conflict or better alternative. Confidence high since quantity is stated and somewhat consistent in magnitude. (Note: nm3 is specialized volume type; assumed matching with m3 with unit normalization).

origin.motivation: Certificate origin country 'SWEDEN' explicitly appears in invoice as 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Normalizations for case and country name variants applied as per rules. EU origin normalization applies but certificate origin 'Sweden' is explicitly stated. No conflicting origin information in invoice. Outcome MATCH.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points, including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin match between certificate and invoice within allowed normalization and rules. No discrepancies, contradictions, or uncertainties detected.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten är korrekta och kan godkännas automatiskt.
